title: ServiceConfig
description:
An operator-facing service declaration from `.yah/services/<svc>/service.toml`.

A service groups one or more components (a static surface, a containerized API, an almanac…) under a single domain. Mirrors project the service onto concrete infra; see [`MirrorConfig`].

ServiceComponent.description: One component of a [`ServiceConfig`]. The `kind` (e.g. `"mesofact-static"`, `"almanac"`, `"container"`) selects which reconciler runs against the pointed-at workload manifest.

path.description: Path (relative to workspace root) of the directory holding this component's `workload.toml`.

publishes.description: Optional artifact kind this component publishes (`"static"`, `"container-image"`, …). Drives mirror provider-slot routing.
